etimesEid 2026 Moon Sighting Timings: From Delhi to Chennai, Mumbai to Kolkata - Full city timings insideIndia awaits the Chand Raat moon sighting tonight, March 19, 2026, to determine Eid al-Fitr. While Saudi Arabia celebrates on March 20, India's decision hinges on local sightings. The crucial viewing window is brief, post-sunset, with specific times varying by city. A sighting means Eid on March 20; no sighting pushes it to March 21.

etimesWatch: Sloth bear vs tigress? This unexpected interaction highlights the unpredictable nature of wildlife, reminding us that animals don't always conform to our expectations.
